description_long: This object is a modern vehicle wheel featuring a wide, smooth black rubber tire mounted on a metallic alloy rim. The rim displays a five-spoke star pattern, each spoke being robust and slightly concave, radiating from a central hub. The outer edge of the rim is polished and slightly recessed, giving the wheel a sporty and performance-oriented appearance. The central hub area is exposed, showing a circular arrangement of lug nut holes, but no hubcap is present. The tire itself appears to be a slick type, with no visible tread pattern, suggesting it is designed for high-performance or racing applications. The overall construction combines durability and style, suitable for use on sports cars or high-end vehicles in urban environments.
description: A wide, smooth black tire mounted on a five-spoke metallic alloy rim with a polished, recessed edge and exposed central hub. The wheel has a sporty, performance-oriented design with no visible tread pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full width of the smooth, black tire with no visible rim or tread details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the five-spoke metallic rim, exposed central hub, and absence of a hubcap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, displaying the tire's width and smooth surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the inner structure of the rim, central hub with lug nut holes, and no hubcap.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five evenly spaced, straight spokes in a star pattern, radiating from the central hub to the rim with a slight concave profile.
attribute_rim_design: Single-piece alloy rim with a polished, slightly recessed outer lip and a clean, minimalist design. The rim features a deep center section with visible lug nut holes and no decorative elements.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nut holes arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub, with no cover or cap.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: No visible tread; the tire is a slick type with a completely smooth surface, typical of racing or high-performance applications.
